scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && set "PATH=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin;%PATH%" && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd .. && node scripts/copy-apk.js
scripts.apk:update: if exist android\app\build rmdir /s /q android\app\build && npm run build && npx cap sync android && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && set "PATH=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin;%PATH%" && cd android && gradlew.bat clean && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd .. && node scripts/copy-apk.js
